ultrabrain.description: Hard logic-heavy tasks, complex architecture decisions, strategic advisor mindset

deep.description: Goal-oriented autonomous problem-solving with thorough research-first approach

visual-engineering.description: Frontend, UI/UX, design, styling, animation tasks with design-system workflow

artistry.description: Creative and unconventional approaches, novel solutions, artistic tasks

quick.description: Trivial tasks, single file changes, typo fixes, fast and cheap execution

unspecified-low.description: General tasks that don't fit other categories, low to moderate effort

unspecified-high.description: General complex tasks that don't fit other categories, high effort
